sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) the latter part, extreme part, Psa 139:9. More frequently used of time.-(a) end, Deu 11:12 issue, event, latter state, Job 8:7 42:12 Pro 5:4, אַחֲרִיתָהּ מָרָה “her end (the adulterous woman’s) is bitter,” i.e. the latter state of those whom she seduces; comp. Pro 23:32. Sometimes used of a happy issue or event, Pro 23:18 24:14 .-(b) latter time, future time. The prophetic phrase should be noticed, בְּאַחֲרִית הַיָּמִים “in future days” [prop. the end of the days, or latter days], Isa 2:2 Gen 49:1 Mic 4:1 Num 24:14 Dan 10:14.

(2) [“concr.”] posterity, Psa 109:13 Amo 4:2 9:1 Dan 11:4.

אחרית

f. Ch. i.q. the Hebrew אַחֲרִית No. 1 b Dan 2:28.
